items.title: In their 5th and final Summer League game, the #Magic are without Jase Richardson, Noah Penda, Alex Morales and Colin Castleton vs. Boston. All have played plenty in Las Vegas.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
In their 5th and final Summer League game, the #Magic are without Jase Richardson, Noah Penda, Alex Morales and Colin Castleton vs. Boston. All have played plenty in Las Vegas.

Orlando started TyTy Washington Jr., Lester Quinones, Philip Wheeler, Keon Johnson and Will Baker.

items.body_excerpt: My full @orlandosentinel.com story on the #Magic signing second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson to a two-year, two-way contract and re-signing Colin Castleton on a two-way deal, plus what it all means for Orlando’s roster: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/01/o...

media.title: Magic sign 2nd-round pick Nelson, bring back Castleton on two-way deals
media.description: By signing second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson to a two-way contract, the Magic leave open one final standard contract roster spot.

items.title: More news: The #Magic are signing center Colin Castleton to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
More news: The #Magic are signing center Colin Castleton to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com.

Orlando had previously extended Castleton a two-way qualifying offer so his return was expected.

items.title: The #Magic have given Colin Castleton a two-way qualifying offer, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com. He’ll be a restricted free agent.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt: The #Magic have given Colin Castleton a two-way qualifying offer, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com. He’ll be a restricted free agent.
